label: Travel Policies - Metro
content: METRO TRAVEL POLICIES: Bicycles - Only foldable bicycles permitted, NOT allowed during peak hours (07:00-09:30 and 17:00-20:00 weekdays). Luggage - 2 items per passenger, max dimensions 70x50x30cm. Pets - Small pets in carriers only, free of charge. Guide dogs permitted at all times. Food - Sealed drinks only, no hot food. Alcohol consumption prohibited. Smoking and vaping strictly prohibited.
summary: Metro travel rules for bicycles, luggage, pets, food, and conduct.

label: Travel Policies - National Rail
content: NATIONAL RAIL TRAVEL POLICIES: Bicycles - Standard bicycles permitted, max 2 per train, $2 fee, NOT permitted during peak hours (07:00-09:30 and 16:30-19:00 weekdays). Foldable bicycles permitted anytime with no fee. E-scooters NOT permitted. Luggage - 3 items per passenger, overhead rack or luggage areas. Pets - Dogs on leads permitted in standard class, free. Small animals in carriers permitted. Guide dogs allowed in all coaches. Food and drink permitted. Alcohol permitted in moderation. Quiet zones available on selected carriages.
summary: National Rail travel rules for bicycles, luggage, pets, food, and quiet zones.

label: Bicycles on National Rail - Detailed Policy
content: BICYCLES ON NATIONAL RAIL: Standard (non-foldable) bicycles are permitted on national rail services. Conditions: Maximum 2 bicycles per train. Must be placed in designated bicycle bays. NOT permitted during peak hours (07:00-09:30 and 16:30-19:00 Monday-Friday). Fee: $2.00 per bicycle. Foldable bicycles are permitted at any time with no fee. Foldable bicycles must be stored in overhead rack or end of carriage space. Bicycle spaces are first-come-first-served and cannot be reserved in advance. E-scooters and hoverboards are NOT permitted on national rail services under any circumstances.
summary: Standard bicycles $2 fee, max 2 per train, no peak hour travel. Foldable bicycles free, anytime.
